# createConfiguration

**Type Method**

This function creates an instance of `Configuration` with suitable values for use in web browsers.

## Declaration

```swift
static Configuration createConfiguration();
```

## Discussion

```javascript
import { createConfiguration } from "@apple/cktool.target.browser";
```
